name: Aspirant's Sword
description: Notes Despite having exact same base damage as Archon Sword, this sword has additional 10% RoF compared to tiered swords, putting it’s dps between Sword of Acclaim and Sword of Splendor against enemies with low defense.
effects: Aspirant’s Set: This item can be further improved by inscribing it with an artifact from the Path of the Stalwart, Sniper, Swiftblade, or Magus.
